notes: EMA follow-up to the canonical seq2048 + fp16 tied-embedding + sliding challenger. COMPILE_MODE, COMPUTE_DTYPE, and SDPA_BACKEND remain H100 execution defaults, not new model-side levers.
purpose: Measure whether endpoint smoothing improves the composed challenger after the primary truth run.
success_criteria: Reduce pre/post export gap without losing too many training-side gains.
